name: gir1.2-girepository-3.0
title: gir1.2-girepository-3.0
summary: Introspection data for GIRepository library, API version 3.0
description:
Introspection data for GIRepository library, API version 3.0
GObject Introspection is a project for providing machine readable
introspection data of the API of C libraries. This introspection
data can be used in several different use cases, for example
automatic code generation for bindings, API verification and documentation
generation.
.
This package contains the introspection data for the GIRepository library,
which can be used to manipulate the search path used by language bindings
and load introspection data.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use gir1.2-girepository-3.0 because Introspection data for GIRepository library, API version 3.0.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use gir1.2-girepository-3.0 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair gir1.2-girepository-3.0 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gir1.2-girepository-3.0 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
